locator.quote: 20/20 agents POSITIVE across 5 cells. Mean +£214, range +£71 to +£370.

text: Disabling force-close (fc=0) unlocked spectacular in-sample pnl: 20/20 agents positive across 5 cells, mean +£214, range +£71 to +£370.

locator.quote: zero-EV directional variance, not structural edge.

text: On held-out the fc=0 winners collapsed (every agent −£155 to −£195/d); naked P&L is zero-EV directional variance, not structural edge — fc=120 stays on as the safety rail.

locator.quote: either mat% must rise 6× (~30%+) or fc-cost/pair

text: Per-open economics on held-out stayed negative (locked ≈ +£0.13/open vs fc ≈ −£1.20/open); to flip positive, either mat% must rise 6× (~30%+) or fc-cost/pair must drop dramatically.
